name: json-tag-runtime
description: Transport-neutral JSON event runtime for browsers and Node.js

scripts.build:compatibility: esbuild src/browser/compatibility.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/browser/compatibility.js && esbuild src/browser/compatibility-iife.ts --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2020 --banner:js="/* Generated by json-tag-runtime. Do not edit directly. */" --outfile=dist/jsonTagSendData.js && esbuild src/browser/compatibility-iife.ts --bundle --minify --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2020 --banner:js="/* Generated by json-tag-runtime. Do not edit directly. */" --outfile=dist/jsonTagSendData-min.js
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:core && npm run build:browser && npm run build:node && npm run build:iife && npm run build:compatibility && npm run build:types
